ACT
No. 1 of 2018
DateofAssent:9thApril,2018
An Act to provide for an institutional and regulatory
framework for management of public funds; the
strengthening of accountability, oversight, management
and control of public funds in the public financial
management framework; responsibilities and fiduciary
duties of controlling officers and Controlling bodies;
enhancement of cash management systems to ensure
efficient and effective utilisation of cash for the
Government; the processes for efficient production of the
Financial Report for the Republic; the management and
controlofpublicassetsandstores;therepealofthePublic
Finance Act No. 15 of 2004; and matters connected with,
or incidental, to, the foregoing.
